name: Arimoclomol did not improve function or survival in phase 3 ALS
summary: The ORARIALS-01 phase 3 ALS trial is a major boundary condition for arimoclomol translation.
statement: In early ALS, arimoclomol did not improve Combined Assessment of Function and Survival over 76 weeks compared with placebo.
population_or_model: Adults with early amyotrophic lateral sclerosis
quantitative_note: Mean CAFS scores were 0.51 with arimoclomol and 0.49 with placebo (P=0.62); deaths were similar at 29/160 versus 18/79.
caveats: ALS is a severe disease context and does not rule out every chaperone-support mechanism.
The result does rule out simple extrapolation from heat-shock co-induction to broad neurodegenerative benefit.
Treatment-related adverse events and discontinuations were more common with arimoclomol.
